content: Gunmar: Damn caves. The air’s thick with Falmer stink and something else… smells like wet leather and sweat. You been skipping baths again, Lydia? Or is that just your arousal leaking out for our Dragonborn? Lydia: Shut yer trap, old man. At least I don’t reek of forge smoke and regret. And yeah, maybe I’m wet—so what? MJR’s got a fine cock, and it’s my holy duty as Dibella’s faithful to worship it daily. Unlike prudes who still think armor should cover more than a bandit whore’s nipple. Gunmar: Ha! Spirits, you Nords and your so-called . Dibella’s tits, sure, but last I checked, she didn’t command you to bend over for every Draugr-fucking bandit just because they got a pulse. Lydia: Fuck you, Dawnguard fossil. woman knows when to kneel—for her Thane, her gods, and a good Falmer if it’s got the right knives. But I don’t see turning down the whores in Riften when Isran ain’t lookin’. Gunmar: Watch your tongue before I forge it into a chastity belt. And don’t bed Thalmor-sympathizing harlots who think our borders should be wide open for every knife-ear and furstock to waltz in. Lydia: Oh-ho, now we’re talkin’! You wanna live in a walled-off shithole where even our own women need a to ride a cock? Skyrim belongs to the Nords, and the Nords belong in —blood, sweat, and on our terms! Gunmar: …And yet here you are, panting after an outlander Dragonborn. Some Lydia: MJR’s different—he his place. I saw him cleave a dragon’s skull in half, then fuck Serana raw in its corpse. Nord spirit. Unlike your sorry ass, still jerking off to memories of your dead wife.

Gunmar: Pah. Keep telling yourself that, girl. Just hope your precious Dragonborn doesn’t get snared by those bandit sluts before you’ve had your fill. I’ve seen what happens to men who let their cocks do the thinking down here. Lydia: Fuckin’ right he won’t—they’ll be dead before their skirts hit the dirt.
